name: A2A-SIN-Vision-Colab
description: Screen recording + AI vision analysis via direct Gemini REST API. No browser, no Colab MCP, no CDP. 6-model fallback chain for unlimited free-tier vision calls.

cli_commands.look-screen --screenshot /tmp/screen.png: Analyze screenshot via Gemini REST API
cli_commands.look-screen --once --screenshot /tmp/scr: One-shot analysis via Gemini REST API
cli_commands.look-screen --interval 3: Continuous monitoring via Gemini REST API

identity.name: A2A-SIN-Vision-Colab
identity.description: SOTA 2026 Vision Agent using direct Gemini REST API with 6-model fallback chain

capabilities.name: vision_analyze
capabilities.description: Analyze screenshots via Gemini REST API with automatic model fallback
